zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：弱势震荡整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD整体处于66附近窄幅震荡结构，价格略低于20日均线67.46，短线仍受压制，反弹动能有限，市场偏向整理等待方向选择

技术指标方面，MACD持续为负且低于信号线，动能偏空；RSI缺失但从价格表现看未脱离弱势区间，反弹需量能配合关注后续确认

下方支撑关注66.0及65.5区域，上方阻力位于67.5与68.2一线，若突破20日均线则有望打开反弹空间需放量确认有效突破

短线建议以区间交易为主，靠近支撑轻仓试多，跌破65.5止损；若反弹至阻力区可分批减仓，等待趋势明朗后再跟随执行纪律操作

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana vs US Dollar (SOL/USD) is in a mild consolidation phase after a period of subdued volatility. Price action at 66.54 shows trading slightly below the 20-day SMA at 67.47, indicating short-term weakness. The narrow daily range between 66.02 and 66.70 reflects equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Overall structure remains neutral-to-bearish until a decisive breakout above nearby resistance occurs.

Momentum indicators reinforce a cautious outlook. The MACD at -0.575 shows negative momentum, suggesting sellers maintain a slight edge, though lack of signal line data limits confirmation of trend strength. Trading below the SMA(20) signals soft short-term sentiment. Without RSI data, momentum confirmation remains incomplete, so price action around key levels becomes more important than indicator-based signals.

Immediate resistance is at 66.70, aligning with the intraday high. A stronger barrier sits at 67.47, the SMA(20), where a breakout could shift momentum toward 68.20. On the downside, support is 66.02, followed by a psychological level near 65.50. A break below 66.00 would likely extend consolidation into a lower trading range. Intraday rejection near resistance could continue to cap upside momentum in the short term.

Traders may consider a range-bound strategy, favoring scalping between 66.00 support and 66.70 resistance. Conservative buyers should wait for a confirmed close above the SMA(20) before entering longs, targeting 68.00+. Breakdown traders may look for sustained weakness below 66.00 to initiate shorts toward 65.50. Risk management is essential given tight volatility compression.
